items.headline: 3 things to watch in Spurs-Timberwolves Game 5
items.description: Victor Wembanyama was missing from Game 4's crucial moments after an early ejection, and Game 5 may hinge on whether he can make an impact for the Spurs.

items.headline: Live Updates: 2026 NBA Playoffs, Conference Semifinals | Lakers look to extend season versus Thunder
items.description: Enjoy the best highlights from Monday's Playoff action, featuring Pistons-Cavaliers and Thunder-Lakers, with the NBA.com live blog.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Donovan Mitchell fuels huge 3rd quarter, Game 4 victory for Cavaliers
items.description: The home teams have held court through four games and now it’s best-of-3. In this situation, it’s usually up to the stars to decide things.

items.headline: Heat legend Alonzo Mourning travels Rob Pimental's transplant journey with him
items.description: Hall of Famer Alonzo Mourning is helping Rob Pimental, the team's director of team operations, manage his health challenges.

items.headline: Expectations already sky-high for the 2026 NBA Draft class, and the picks are still weeks away
items.description: This year’s Draft class is already setting high expectations after the Wizards won the Draft Lottery on May 10.

items.headline: The Athletic: Brunson’s Knicks legacy is still being written, but it’s already quite good
items.description: The Knicks have become legit title contenders under Jalen Brunson. No one expected that.

items.headline: The Athletic: In Post-Lottery Mock Draft, AJ Dybantsa to Wizards; Darryn Peterson to Jazz
items.description: Washington won big at the Draft Lottery, but there are plenty of potential difference-makers in this class, writes The Athletic's Sam Vecenie.

items.headline: Starting 5: Wolves tie series, Knicks oust 76ers; Looking ahead to Game 4s tonight
items.description: Anthony Edwards shines to even series, the Knicks oust Sixers behind a 3-point barrage and we look ahead to tonight's Game 4s.

items.headline: Victor Wembanyama ejected on flagrant foul in Spurs' Game 4 loss
items.description: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama was ejected for throwing an elbow toward Wolves big Naz Reid early in the 2nd quarter of Game 4.

items.headline: AJ Dybantsa eagerly awaits the 2026 NBA Draft and his future
items.description: For 4 years, AJ Dybantsa has lived under the spotlight as a top HS prospect & one of the best freshmen in NCAA basketball.

items.headline: Recap: Timberwolves even series with Spurs after Wembanyama's ejection
Washington Wizards win 2026 NBA Draft Lottery
items.description: The Washington Wizards win the 2026 NBA Draft Lottery and will pick No. 1 in the 2026 NBA Draft.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Thunder-Lakers Game 4
items.description: The Lakers trail the defending champion Thunder 3-0 in their Western Conference semifinal series, a daunting task to take on.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Pistons-Cavaliers Game 4
items.description: Veterans James Harden and Tobias Harris could prove difference makers as Cavaliers, Pistons vie to advance to the East Finals.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Victor Wembanyama ejected, Wolves thrive to even series
items.description: The Wolves gather themselves, ride star Anthony Edwards and make most of the pivotal plays near the end to pull even at 2-2 with the Spurs.
